hero.subTagline: The only DEX where community forms inside the product.

market.title: The Market
market.intro: The unified DEX thesis is proven. The differentiation battle is just beginning.

points.title: $100B+ in DeFi TVL
points.description: Spread across 500+ protocols on dozens of chains. Users manage multiple wallets, bridge between networks, and accept fragmented risk exposure just to access basic financial services.

points.title: Unified Finance Is Table Stakes
points.description: Hyperliquid, dYdX v4, and Jupiter have already consolidated trading verticals. Unified margin is no longer a differentiator — it is a minimum requirement. The market has moved past whether to unify, to how to retain users after unifying.

points.title: The Real Gap
points.description: Every unified DEX solves capital fragmentation. None solves community fragmentation. Users trade on Hyperliquid and discuss on Discord. The social context lives outside the product. Pado is the first platform where community forms inside the trading interface.

points.title: Own L1 = Full Stack Control
points.description: By running on Nasun — a dedicated Sui-forked L1 — Pado controls consensus, execution, fee structure, and upgrade cadence. Zero dependency on external chain governance or congestion.

product.title: The Product
product.intro: Pado is a non-custodial unified finance application live on Nasun Devnet.

highlights.title: Finance-First Social
highlights.description: The primary differentiator. Community gathers inside the product, not in a Discord server. Chat embedded in trading pairs, leaderboards that drive competition, prediction markets that turn conviction into conversation. No feed. No followers. No likes. Just markets and the people in them.

highlights.title: 7 Products, 1 Account
highlights.description: Spot trading, perpetual futures, lending, prediction markets, lottery, staking, and payments — all accessible from a single smart account with shared collateral.

highlights.title: CEX-Grade UX, DEX-Level Transparency
highlights.description: zkLogin enables 30-second onboarding with no seed phrase. All execution is fully on-chain and verifiable. Users get exchange-grade convenience without surrendering custody.

highlights.title: Unified Capital Infrastructure
highlights.description: Portfolio-level risk management across all products. Multi-collateral support with tiered risk weights. This is the infrastructure layer that keeps capital flowing — and keeps users from needing to leave.

traction.title: Traction & Execution
traction.intro: Not a whitepaper. Not a roadmap. A working prototype.

metrics.label: Custom L1 Blockchain
metrics.detail: Sui fork with own validator set

deployed: WebSocket chat server with signature-based authentication
Testnet leaderboard with on-chain trading data
Full CLOB DEX (DeepBook V3) with real orderbook execution
Binary prediction markets with on-chain resolution
Weekly lottery with Sui Random verifiable fairness
Unified margin engine with multi-collateral risk thresholds
zkLogin smart accounts with social recovery
Rust-based event indexer for real-time trading data

business.title: Business Model
business.intro: Multiple revenue streams that scale with platform adoption.

streams.title: Trading Fees
streams.description: Maker/taker fees on spot and perpetual markets. Primary revenue driver that scales directly with trading volume.

streams.title: Lending Spread
streams.description: Protocol takes a spread between lending and borrowing rates. Generates passive revenue proportional to lending pool utilization.

streams.title: Lottery Treasury
streams.description: 10% of lottery ticket sales allocated to protocol treasury. Provides consistent revenue from a high-engagement product.

streams.title: Premium Features (Future)
streams.description: Copy trading subscriptions, AI agent access, and strategy marketplace commissions. Second-order revenue enabled by platform network effects.

streams.title: NFT Sales (Community Round)
streams.description: Genesis NFT collection as the first community funding mechanism. Provides early liquidity while aligning incentives between team and community.

roadmap.title: Roadmap

phases.title: Now
phases.subtitle: Community Formation
items: Live prototype with embedded chat and leaderboard
Community building and early contributor programs

phases.title: Then
phases.subtitle: Intelligence & Scale
items: AI agents (Risk Sentinel, Market Narrator, Strategy Simulator)

roadmap.sequence: NFT Funding → Community Growth → VC Raise → Mainnet

ask.title: The Ask
ask.intro: Pado is raising its first external round to accelerate from prototype to mainnet.

details.title: Use of Funds
details.content: Engineering team expansion (2 → 4), infrastructure scaling, liquidity bootstrapping for mainnet launch, and security audits.

details.title: Why Now
details.content: No existing platform combines real financial execution with embedded social infrastructure. The unified DEX category is consolidating fast — but differentiation through community is still unclaimed. This is a timing opportunity.
